headline: Will Apollo’s Record Fee Earnings and GAAP Loss Reshape Apollo Global Management’s (APO) Investment Narrative?
summary: Apollo Global Management recently reported first-quarter 2026 results showing revenue of US$5,059 million and a GAAP net loss of US$1,906 million, even as it declared a quarterly dividend of US$0.5625 per share and crossed US$1 trillion in assets under management. Beneath the headline loss, Apollo highlighted record fee-related earnings and strong fee-generating assets, underscoring the importance of its recurring, asset-light income streams. Next, we will examine how Apollo’s record...

headline: Yahoo Raises $1.6 Billion As 11% Bond Yield Grabs Investor Attention
summary: Yahoo refinanced Apollo buyout debt with a high-yield loan and bond deal as AI pressures weigh on its credit profile.

content.title: Yahoo Raises $1.6 Billion As 11% Bond Yield Grabs Investor Attention

headline: Apollo, Blackstone reportedly in talks for $35B Broadcom financing deal
summary: Investing.com -- Apollo Global Management Inc. and Blackstone Inc. are in discussions with Broadcom Inc. regarding approximately $35 billion in financing to support the chipmaker’s artificial intelligence chip development, according to a Bloomberg report Friday.

content.title: Apollo, Blackstone reportedly in talks for $35B Broadcom financing deal
content.summary: Investing.com -- Apollo Global Management Inc. and Blackstone Inc. are in discussions with Broadcom Inc. regarding approximately $35 billion in financing to support the chipmaker’s artificial intelligence chip development, according to a Bloomberg report Friday.

headline: Apollo, Blackstone Weigh $35 Billion Financing for Broadcom
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Apollo Global Management Inc. and Blackstone Inc. are among private credit lenders involved in talks with chipmaker Broadcom Inc. over a roughly $35 billion financing, the latest indication that companies are mobilizing all sources of capital to fund the AI build-out.
